generated_assessment.reasoning: The exposure text highlights perceived unfairness in defense spending among NATO allies, which resonates with the profile's low agreeableness and high neuroticism, particularly anger/hostility. request_payload.exposure_text: Did you know our allies are quietly shifting defense budgets while pushing for more from us? New data shows NATO partners cut spending by 3% last year, yet we're still expected to cover the gap. Time to demand real burden-sharing or reconsider commitments that leave us exposed. #NationalSecurityFirst
